use_cases: Primary call-to-action trigger in forms and interfaces
Navigation links with accessible focus states
Icon-based action buttons for toolbars and menus
Secondary action buttons with outline styling
Destructive action triggers with warning styling
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features standard accessibility attributes including focus-visible ring and disabled states. Clean, minimal styling suitable for any design system.
